summary: Apple Inc. is a leading technology company with a strong brand reputation and loyal customer base, but valuation multiples suggest overvaluation and high debt levels are potential risks.
metrics: Price-to-Earnings (P/E) Ratio: 34.15x, Price-to-Sales (P/S) Ratio: 9.17x, Forward P/E: 29.32x, Return on Equity (ROE): 1.41%, Gross Margin: 47.86%, Operating Margin: 32.27%, Profit Margin: 27.15%, Current Ratio: 1.07, Total Debt: $84,710,980,016, Cash and Cash Equivalents: $68,500,800,832
